summary_one_line: Input must contain a well-formed tRNS chunk so libpng sets PNG_FREE_TRNS in free_me, satisfying the AND-mask gate.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally valid PNG whose chunk stream includes a parseable tRNS chunk (correct 'tRNS' FOURCC type tag plus a self-consistent length/CRC and a prior valid IHDR establishing color type) so that libpng allocates a tRNS entry and OR's the PNG_FREE_TRNS bit into info_ptr->free_me; the TRUE side of line 507 then becomes reachable.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner (cmplog) seeds share a stable, intact PNG header region (signature + IHDR + gAMA + sRGB) with concentrated byte values at the chunk-type/length offsets, indicating the parser advanced deep enough to recognize ancillary chunks and set free_me bits; the blocker TRUE side fires (W has T=11 at line 507 vs L T=0) and the W-only tRNS-free body (lines 508-513) executes.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser (naive) seeds corrupt exactly the header dataflow bytes that gate chunk parsing (e.g. IHDR dimension/color-type bytes at 0x16-0x19 and chunk-type bytes at 0x25-0x28 diverge from the winner's consistent values), so libpng never recognizes/allocates a tRNS entry, PNG_FREE_TRNS is never set in free_me, and line 507 stays on the FALSE side (L T=0 F=23).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer of intercepted integer/memory comparisons (chunk-type FOURCC checks, length/dimension comparisons libpng performs while parsing) and substitutes the expected operand directly into the matching input offsets, planting the exact magic/structural bytes needed for libpng to accept a tRNS chunk; naive must hit the same multi-byte constraints by blind havoc, which it never does in 10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked TRUE side gates on PNG_FREE_TRNS being set in info_ptr->free_me.
The true branch is the globally blocked side, and only the winner runs the tRNS-free body.
Winner takes the true side at line 507 while loser never does.
cmplog resolves all 10 trials while naive blocks all 10, isolating the I2S delta.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=0/10  blocked=10  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: Winner header/chunk bytes are concentrated and stable across seeds, indicating intact chunk parsing.
Loser seeds diverge from the winner at the IHDR dimension/color-type and chunk-type dataflow offsets.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets, which naive lacks.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mutator, only havoc/token operators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3810 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 230924cbdaa2cc5c` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 3 of the 4-level ancestor chain; tool reported '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 3', the current-build lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the cmplog lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose tRNS-acceptance gate depends only on a single isolated byte comparison (not a multi-byte FOURCC/length structure) on which naive resolves the TRUE branch as fast as cmplog, showing I2S substitution is not what plants the required bytes.

weakest_evidence_point: The precise set of input offsets I2S must plant to make libpng allocate a tRNS entry is inferred from header-region byte stability, not from an explicit tRNS chunk visible in the shown 64-byte seed prefixes.
